name: Speedy Spam Quiche
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Spam® Lite luncheon meat, cubed
1/4 cup low-fat Monterey Jack cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare a 9-inch square pan with cooking spray.
3. In a small bowl, combine cubed luncheon meat, chopped onions, and bell peppers. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pan.
4. Sprinkle shredded cheese over the top of the filling.
5. In a mixing bowl, combine baking mix, skim milk, slightly beaten egg whites, and black pepper. Mix well until smooth.
6. Pour the batter evenly over the cheese in the pan.
7. Bake for 40 minutes, or until lightly browned. Let stand five minutes before serving.
